title: Special Education: Students in Nondistrict Placement
description: This policy addresses the provision of special education services to students who are placed in settings outside of the district, such as private schools, residential facilities, or other nondistrict programs. It governs the district's responsibilities for ensuring that eligible students continue to receive appropriate special education services regardless of their placement location. The policy outlines how the district coordinates with outside placements to meet the educational needs of students with disabilities.
